prompt: Move Ethernet adjacency ownership out of FWD
note: Removed the FWD adjacency registry and Ethernet adjacency handler; Ethernet now owns gateway/direct target selection, ARP resolution, and frame output while FWD remains a thin interface-kind dispatcher
decisions: Delete the obsolete FWD adjacency API instead of retaining compatibility wrappers
Each future media handler such as PPP or Tunnel will own its own adjacency semantics
